app.header.tagline: Trash & trade filters for Pokémon GO. Protect what matters, sweep the rest.
app.step.where.label: Where do you play?
app.step.where.title: Where do you play?
app.step.where.hint: Pin your home location and discover which Pokémon are regional to you — we protect those automatically.
app.step.what.label: What do you want to keep?
app.step.what.title: What do you want to keep?
app.step.what.hint: Pick a preset as a starting point, then fine-tune — favorites, shinies, legendaries, and more.
app.step.have.label: What's in your collection?
app.step.have.title: What's in your collection?
app.step.have.hint: Your 4★ collection (hundos) — these widen the trash filter so you can clean up spares.
app.step.filter.label: Your filter
app.step.filter.title: Your filter
app.step.filter.hint: Done — copy the filter strings and paste them into PoGo's search box.
app.hundos.input_placeholder: Number or name — e.g. 1, Pikachu, Bulbasaur, 666
app.hundos.input_help: Accepts {numbers}, {english}, or {german} names. Separate multiple with comma, space, or semicolon.
app.collectibles.title: Your custom collectibles · added to trash protection
app.collectibles.description: Species you collect and never want to throw away — favorites, form collections, etc.
app.collectibles.input_placeholder: Number or name — e.g. Charizard, 6, Rayquaza
app.filterbox.select_all_hint: Tap to select all — then copy via the system menu
app.clauses.intro: Every clause in the final filter, with the reason it's there. Clauses are joined with & — every clause must match for a Pokémon to appear.
app.buddy_catch.section_subtitle: trashable Pokémon of the wish list species
app.collapsible.raw_clauses: raw filter clauses · what comes from where
app.preset.section_hint: Presets overwrite all settings below. Fine-tune from there.
app.preset.casual.label: Casual
app.preset.casual.description: All important protections on, lenient PvP
app.preset.collector.label: Collector
app.preset.collector.description: Recommended for dex completion — protects all forms
app.preset.aggressive.label: Aggressive
app.preset.aggressive.description: Fast cleanup — no form protection, strict PvP
app.preset.pvpFocus.label: PvP focus
app.preset.pvpFocus.description: Strict PvP IVs, protects league tags, otherwise aggressive
app.protect.section_title: Protections · what should never be tossed
app.protect.te_section_title: Trade-evo families · free evo via trade
app.protect.te_button_title: +{name} — when on, all family members (pre- and post-evolutions) are protected in the trade filter
app.protect.home_locals.note: These spawn locally for you — protecting them would be redundant and would shrink the trash filter for your hundos.
app.protect.myth_carve.label: Mythicals you have spares of (dex numbers, comma-separated)
app.protect.myth_carve.help: These are exempted from the mythical protection — e.g. Meltan, where most players have hundreds.
app.protect.favorites.label: Favorites
app.protect.any_tag.label: Tagged Pokémon (any tag)
app.protect.any_tag.why: any tag — anything tagged is safe
app.protect.trade_evos.label: Trade evolutions
app.protect.trade_evos.why: Protects families that get a free evolution by trading (Abra, Machop, Gastly, ...) — except those already traded (free evo already used)
app.protect.shinies.label: Shinies
app.protect.luckies.label: Lucky Pokémon
app.protect.legendaries.label: Legendaries
app.protect.legendaries.why: Mewtwo, Lugia, etc. — not bulk-tradeable anyway
app.protect.shadows.label: Shadow Pokémon
app.protect.shadows.why: Trash protection. Trade is blocked anyway (shadow are untradeable).
app.protect.costumes.label: Costumed
app.protect.costumes.why: Event forms like Pikachu with sunglasses
app.protect.backgrounds.label: With background
app.protect.legacy_moves.label: Legacy moves
app.protect.babies.label: Baby Pokémon
app.protect.babies.why: Pokémon that only hatch from eggs
app.protect.xxl.label: XXL size
app.protect.xl.label: XL size
app.protect.xxs.label: XXS size
app.protect.new_evolutions.label: New evolutions
app.protect.new_evolutions.why: Pokémon whose evolution would be a new dex entry
app.protect.double_moved.label: Second charge move
app.protect.double_moved.why: Pokémon with the second charge move unlocked
app.protect.four_star.label: Protect 4★ hundos
app.protect.four_star.why: Safety net: never toss 4★ — Rule 1. DISABLE AT YOUR OWN RISK.
app.protect.mythicals.label: Mythicals
app.protect.ultra_beasts.label: Ultra Beasts
app.protect.purified.label: Purified
app.protect.purified.why: Former shadow Pokémon, lose bonus when traded
app.protect.dynamax.label: Dynamax-capable
app.protect.buddies_protect.label: Was a buddy
app.protect.buddies_protect.why: Sentimental protection — no one wants to trade away their old buddies
app.modal.settings.title: Settings
app.modal.language.output_help: Language of your PoGo app — determines what language the filter output uses
app.modal.language.output_mismatch: ⚠ Note: Filters output in {output} while the UI is in {ui}. Set both the same if your PoGo app matches your browser's language.
app.modal.settings.mode_normal_help: Sensible defaults — Expert for fine control
app.modal.tags.section_title: Trade tags · protected in the filter
app.modal.custom_tags.help: e.g. if you use PvPIV or PokeGenie
app.modal.league.help: embedded in the nickname — e.g. "ⓤ Rattata" for Ultra League
app.modal.safety.cp_hint: shows only Pokémon with CP ≤ value (default: 2000)
app.modal.safety.age_hint: shows only Pokémon from the last X days
app.modal.danger.reset_help: Resets the hundo list, all protections, tags, home location and trash list to defaults.
app.buddy.section_title: Trade buddies · one tag prefix per buddy (e.g. #Auri)
app.buddy.section_help: In the game you'd tag things like {tag1} or {tag2}. PoGo's substring match protects all sub-tags automatically.
app.buddy_events.section_help: Which species are you currently collecting for your buddies? Surfaces in the "{filter_name}" filter — shows only trashable (0–2★) Pokémon of those species that you haven't tagged yet.
app.buddy_targets.te_toggle_title: Adds trade-evo families (Abra, Machop, Gastly, ...) to the catch filter — useful when the buddy collects free evolutions
app.buddy_targets.input_placeholder: Species (number or name) — e.g. Pikachu, 132, melmetal
app.regional_editor.home_local_title: automatically disabled — this species spawns locally for you (home)
app.regional.alolan.label: Alolan forms
app.regional.alolan.notes.raichu_psychic: Alolan Raichu (Electric/Psychic) — regular Raichu isn't Psychic
app.regional.galarian.label: Galarian forms
app.regional.hisuian.label: Hisuian forms
app.regional.hisuian.description: Pokémon Legends: Arceus — Hisuian regional forms
app.regional.paldean.label: Paldean forms
app.regional.regionals.label: Regional Pokémon
app.regional.collectibles.label: Collectibles
app.regional.collectibles.description: Multi-form / pattern collections — forms aren't separately searchable in PoGo
app.clause_why.trade_evo_family: Trade-evo: +{name} family (except already traded — free evo already used)
app.clause_why.buddy_tag: Trade buddy {name}: anything with the #{prefix} prefix (substring match)
app.clause_why.mythicals_carved: Mythicals except dex {carve} (you have spares of those)
app.clause_why.new_evolutions: New evolutions (trick: only if not yet mega'd — otherwise you have plenty of mega energy)
app.clause_why.double_moved_trash: Second charge move unlocked (@3move is inverted!)
app.clause_why.age_traded: Safety net: caught within {days} days OR traded
app.clause_why.must_traded: MUST: already-traded Pokémon can't be traded again
app.clause_why.must_shadow: MUST: Shadow Pokémon can't be traded
app.clause_why.must_lucky_long: MUST: Lucky Pokémon can't be traded again (already came from a trade)
app.clause_why.must_mythical_long: MUST: Mythicals untradeable (except Meltan/Melmetal via special trade)
app.clause_why.any_tag_trade: any tag — whichever, not for bulk trade
app.clause_why.bazaar_tag_trade: your bulk-trade tag #{tag} (only shows what you haven't yet marked — traded-list management)
app.clause_why.purified: Purified (= former shadow, lose bonus when traded)
app.clause_why.distance_zero: Safety net: distance > 0km (= was caught somewhere else)
app.clause_why.must_lucky_short: MUST: Lucky can't be traded again
app.clause_why.trashable_stars: only trashable stars (0-2★) — you keep 3★+ yourself
app.clause_why.not_tagged: not already tagged in any way
app.clause_why.valuables_no_locals: Valuables: shiny, legendary, ultra beast, costume, background
app.clause_why.valuables_with_locals: Valuables: shiny, legendary, ultra beast, costume, background + local regionals ({count})
app.clause_why.untagged_or_marked: untagged OR marked for trade ({tags}) — other tags protected
app.map.local_already_title: already at home — friends get those via you
app.map.hint_with_home: hover the map to preview, click to pin
app.map.hint_no_home: hover the map, click your location, then "Set as home"
app.map.already_have_title: You catch these anyway — tag only if you want to mark them too
app.map.bazaar_empty_help: Tap the map to find regional Pokémon, then mark them with your trade tag {tag} in PoGo. The trash filter protects them automatically.
app.map.attribution: regional polygon data: u/zoglandboy / u/Mattman243 / pokemoncalendar.com
app.pvp.section_title: PvP mode · what counts as a keeper
app.set_theory.rule1_help: Rule 1 (never toss 4★) is {auto} — any 4★ hundo trivially matches K, so ¬K excludes them. K and P are disjoint (atk≥3 vs atk≤1), so they don't overlap.
